temporal_description: A close-up, profile shot focuses on a middle-aged man with short, graying hair. He wears a light-colored collared shirt under a dark suit jacket. His expression is somber and contemplative as he looks down and to the side. The scene is bathed in a moody, greenish light, and the background is a blurry, indistinct interior. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's quiet intensity. The audio is filled with a low, suspenseful, and atmospheric musical score. A deep, resonant, and slightly ominous tone creates a feeling of tension and seriousness, suggesting a dramatic or crime-themed scene. The music is slow and deliberate, building a sense of anticipation without any dialogue or sound effects to distract from its somber mood. The camera pulls back slightly to a medium shot, revealing more of the man and his surroundings. He is now seen from the front, still looking down with a worried or concerned expression. Behind him, two other men are visible in the background, slightly out of focus. One man stands directly behind him, and another is to his right. They are in what appears to be an outdoor area at night, with a metal fence and a dimly lit building in the background. The overall color palette remains a dark, greenish-blue. The white Chinese text is still present in the top left corner. The camera is stationary, maintaining a steady focus on the group.
